hero.bio: A passionate, performance-oriented Backend Engineer with expertise in building robust, scalable, and efficient server-side systems.

about.quote: Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: With over 4 years of experience in programming, I specialize as a Backend Engineer passionate about building robust, scalable, and efficient server-side systems. I enjoy designing API architectures, optimizing database performance, and working in dynamic, collaborative environments.
about.edu_desc: Pursued a D4 in Informatics Engineering covering Web Apps, Mobile Apps, IoT, AI & Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Networking — all integrated into a single cohesive system in every semester project.

projects.title: Popular Projects
projects.quote_line1: "Good code is easy to read. Great code doesn't need explaining.
projects.quote_line2: A backend isn't just a server — it's the foundation of everything."

blog.title: Blog
blog.desc: I document my journey as a Backend Engineer — from system architecture and API optimization to exploring AI and emerging technologies.
blog.wip: Some articles are still being written. Stay tuned for the next post! 🚀

aboutPage.hero_bio: A young developer from Banyuwangi passionate about technology. Specialized in backend engineering with great curiosity across various aspects of modern technology.
aboutPage.bio_subtitle: Getting to know me more closely — my background and what keeps driving me to grow.
aboutPage.bio_p1: I am a young Backend Engineer born and raised in Banyuwangi, East Java. My coding journey began after graduating from vocational school, when curiosity about technology led me into the world of programming.
aboutPage.bio_p2: With a D4 Informatics Engineering educational background, I have developed expertise across various technology stacks — from frontend to backend, and even AI & Machine Learning. Yet my greatest passion remains in backend engineering.
aboutPage.bio_p3: I believe technology is a universal language, and I am actively learning English and German to broaden my horizons and open up international career opportunities.
aboutPage.bio_p4: What makes me unique? I have a cross-disciplinary interest — wanting to bridge the world of software engineering with mechanical engineering in the future.
aboutPage.journey_subtitle: From zero to now — every milestone is a stepping stone towards a better version of myself.
aboutPage.journey_0_desc: Just graduated and started seriously learning programming from scratch. Began the journey with algorithms and basic logic.
aboutPage.journey_1_title: Learned C++ for the First Time
aboutPage.journey_1_desc: The first technology learned was C++. Studied programming fundamentals: variables, loops, functions, and basic OOP.
aboutPage.journey_2_desc: Successfully built a cashier app for a laundry business as the first real project. First experience creating useful software.
aboutPage.journey_3_desc: Attended an intensive bootcamp at Decoding. Deepened modern web development knowledge and thoroughly learned the JavaScript ecosystem.
aboutPage.journey_4_desc: Interned as a Remote Full Stack Developer at Soko Financial, Yogyakarta. First professional experience at a fintech startup.
aboutPage.journey_5_desc: Won 3rd Place in the National Web Design Competition organized by UKM Linux at Universitas Jember. A proud competitive achievement.
aboutPage.journey_6_desc: Participated in the MBKM TEFA (Teaching Factory) program in the Information Technology Department as a Web Developer. Worked on real web-based projects in an academic-industry environment.
aboutPage.journey_7_title: Internship at PT BISI International & Charoen Pokphand
aboutPage.journey_7_desc: Interned at PT BISI International Tbk and Charoen Pokphand Group as a Mobile App Developer. Developed Flutter-based mobile applications to support enterprise operations.
aboutPage.exp_subtitle: The professional track record that shaped my skills and perspective on technology.
aboutPage.tech_subtitle: The technology arsenal I use to build high-quality digital products.
aboutPage.soft_subtitle: Interpersonal abilities that complement technical skills in every collaboration and problem-solving situation.
aboutPage.soft_0_desc: Breaking down complex problems into efficient and structured solutions.
aboutPage.soft_1_desc: Working effectively in teams, valuing every contribution and perspective.
aboutPage.soft_2_desc: Quickly adapting to new technologies and constantly evolving concepts.
aboutPage.soft_3_desc: Conveying technical ideas clearly to both team members and non-technical stakeholders.
aboutPage.soft_4_desc: Creating innovative solutions with a creative approach beyond the ordinary.
aboutPage.soft_5_desc: Managing time and priorities well to meet deadlines while maintaining quality.
aboutPage.goals_subtitle: Every step today is an investment for the future I want to create.
aboutPage.goal_short_0: Master English to a fluent conversational level
aboutPage.goal_short_2: Obtain an international certification in backend or cloud
aboutPage.goal_long_0: Work abroad (Germany, Japan, Australia, Switzerland, or Kuwait)
aboutPage.goal_long_1: Become a globally recognized Senior Engineer
aboutPage.goal_long_2: Build a startup or digital product with real impact
aboutPage.goal_long_3: Master Mechanical Engineering as a cross-disciplinary skill
aboutPage.goal_vision_0: Become an engineer who bridges the software and hardware worlds
aboutPage.goal_vision_1: Explore a transition from IT Engineer to Mechanical Engineer
aboutPage.goal_vision_2: Contribute to technologies that improve human lives
aboutPage.goal_vision_3: Inspire the next generation of young developers from Indonesia
aboutPage.hobbies_subtitle: Life outside the screen that gives energy and fresh inspiration every day.
aboutPage.hobby_0_desc: Spending free time with strategy and RPG games.
aboutPage.hobby_1_desc: Listening to various music genres, from lo-fi to metal.
aboutPage.hobby_2_desc: A true cat lover, always greeting every cat encountered.
aboutPage.hobby_3_desc: Capturing special moments and the aesthetics of surrounding nature.
aboutPage.hobby_4_desc: Hobby and career in one — coding is still fun in free time.
aboutPage.hobby_5_desc: Morning ritual with coffee, the main fuel before each coding session.
aboutPage.hobby_6_desc: Reading books on technology, psychology, and self-development.
aboutPage.hobby_7_desc: Always exploring new technologies and the latest industry trends.
aboutPage.facts_subtitle: Some things that might make you say 'oh, interesting!'
aboutPage.fact_0: I can code while listening to music for 6 hours straight without noticing time passing.
aboutPage.fact_1: The first language I learned was C++, not HTML/CSS like most people.
aboutPage.fact_2: I often debug while talking to my pet cat — surprisingly effective!
aboutPage.fact_3: I aim to live and work in at least 2 different countries before turning 30.
aboutPage.fact_4: Dark terminal and monospace font are my favorite coding setup — a beauty in itself.
aboutPage.fact_5: I want to learn Mechanical Engineering as a second skill — from software to hardware.
aboutPage.fact_6: Black coffee without sugar is the loyal companion for every coding marathon session.
aboutPage.fact_7: I still vividly remember the excitement when the first program ran successfully in the terminal.
aboutPage.quotes_subtitle: Words that always inspire me to keep moving forward and growing.
aboutPage.cta_desc: Interested in working together or just chatting about technology? I'm always open for discussion.
